auth_notes: Requires an API Key generated from the account settings, typically passed as a 'Bearer' token or 'X-API-Key' in the HTTP header.
rate_limits: 60 requests per minute per API key
gotchas: Nested JSON structures for line items require complex expressions in n8n
Lack of native webhook support necessitates polling for status changes
Rate limits are strictly enforced and can lead to 429 errors during bulk updates
research_notes: As there is no native node, the integration must be built using the HTTP Request node. Authentication should be configured using 'Header Auth' in n8n credentials. Data transformation using the 'Set' or 'Code' node will be necessary to format line items into the required JSON array format.

Data transformation using the 'Set' or 'Code' node will be necessary to format line items into the required JSON array format.
